title: Input Validation Error Templates
description: Error messages for input validation failures

INVALID_SPEC_NAME.message: Invalid spec name: '{{name}}'. Must be lowercase, alphanumeric, and hyphens only.

INVALID_FILE_PATH.message: Invalid file path: '{{path}}'. Contains illegal characters.
INVALID_FILE_PATH.hint: File paths must contain only letters, numbers, slashes, dots, hyphens, and underscores

SPEC_NAME_TOO_SHORT.message: Spec name '{{name}}' is too short ({{length}} characters). Minimum length is 3.
SPEC_NAME_TOO_SHORT.hint: Use a descriptive name that clearly indicates the feature

SPEC_NAME_TOO_LONG.message: Spec name '{{name}}' is too long ({{length}} characters). Maximum length is 50.
SPEC_NAME_TOO_LONG.hint: Shorten the name while keeping it descriptive

PREREQUISITE_NOT_MET.recovery: Run the prerequisite command and try again

FILE_NOT_FOUND.hint: Ensure the file exists before running this command
FILE_NOT_FOUND.recovery: Create the file or run the appropriate command to generate it

INVALID_ENUM_VALUE.hint: Choose one of the allowed values

PATTERN_MISMATCH.message: Value '{{value}}' does not match required pattern: {{pattern}}

RANGE_ERROR.message: Value {{value}} is out of range for {{parameter}}. Expected {{min}} to {{max}}
RANGE_ERROR.hint: Provide a value within the allowed range

DUPLICATE_SPEC_NAME.hint: Choose a different name or delete the existing spec
DUPLICATE_SPEC_NAME.recovery: Use a unique name or remove the existing spec with the same name
